# Copilot Instructions

## High-level architecture
- This repository is a single-document resume; all content lives in README.md.
- README.md is organized into major sections: Summary, Skills, Experience, Education, Professional Certifications, and Hobby Languages.

## Key conventions
- Preserve the section order and Markdown heading structure in README.md.
- The Skills section uses a two-column Markdown table; keep the table layout intact.
- Each Experience entry follows the pattern: bold company line, date line, italic role line, then bullet responsibilities in reverse-chronological order.
